# infomaniak_public_cloud_config (Data Source)

Reads the Public Cloud configuration of the given account (free tier, resource level, validity window).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "infomaniak_public_cloud_config" "this" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `account_id` (Number) Infomaniak account identifier. Discover it with `curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $INFOMANIAK_TOKEN" https://api.infomaniak.com/2/profile | jq '.data.preferences.account.current_account_id'`.

### Read-Only

- `account_resource_level` (Number) Resource level of the account (1–4).
- `free_tier` (Number) Free-tier amount limit, in the account currency.
- `free_tier_used` (Number) Free-tier amount already consumed.
- `project_count` (Number) Number of projects currently owned by the account.
- `valid_from` (Number) Timestamp this configuration became valid. May be 0 when the API returns null.
- `valid_to` (Number) Timestamp this configuration expires. May be 0 when the API returns null.
